input.diagnosis: Pediatric feeding disorder, suspected aspiration on thin liquids
input.assessment_text: Coughs consistently on water, refuses thickened formula. Currently NPO for thin liquids per pediatrician.
input.stg_text: Tolerate IDDSI Level 2 across three consecutive sessions

input.assessment_text: Currently uses 5-symbol core board. Functional communication limited to requesting preferred items. No protest or comment functions emerging.
input.stg_text: Independently combine 2 symbols to request and refuse across 5 daily routines

input.diagnosis: Childhood Apraxia of Speech, expressive language delay
input.assessment_text: Inconsistent productions of bilabials and alveolars. Limited phoneme inventory. MLU 1.2. PROMPT trained.
input.stg_text: Produce CV combinations with bilabials at 80% accuracy with visual-auditory cueing

input.assessment_text: Broca's aphasia profile. Severe anomia. Agrammatic output. Comprehension relatively preserved. No dysphagia signs on bedside screen.
input.stg_text: Retrieve 20 functional nouns with semantic cueing

input.diagnosis: Stroke, kha nahi sakte, aspiration risk hai
input.assessment_text: Patient post-CVA. Thin liquids pe cough. NG tube currently. Need to start oral trials safely.
input.stg_text: IDDSI 4 tolerance with no aspiration signs

input.assessment_text: Symbol board use limited. Parent wants device-based AAC trial. Currently uses 3-4 pictures for basic requests.
input.stg_text: Combine 2 symbols on tablet AAC for request and refusal

input.assessment_text: Intact lexical retrieval and syntax. Pragmatic deficits — fails to interpret prosody, missing implied meaning, inappropriate humor timing. Reduced topic maintenance. Family reports personality changes.
input.stg_text: Identify inferred meaning in 8/10 conversational vignettes

input.assessment_text: Severe breathy dysphonia. s/z ratio 2.1. MPT 4 seconds. No aspiration on FEES.
input.stg_text: Begin baseline observation, prepare for RVT trial

input.diagnosis: Left MCA stroke with dysphagia; mild aphasia secondary
input.assessment_text: Primary clinical concern is failed 3oz water swallow test with cough — NPO pending VFSS. Also presents with mild Broca's profile, functional naming limited but communication preserved. Swallowing is the immediate intervention priority.
input.stg_text: Tolerate IDDSI 2 across three consecutive sessions

input.diagnosis: Complex pediatric case — ASD, motor planning concerns, AAC user, fluency emerging in connected speech
input.assessment_text: Multiple intervention threads. Currently uses AAC for primary communication. PROMPT cueing for emerging speech. Some disfluency noted in 2-word combinations. Sensory regulation needs ongoing support.
input.stg_text: Combine 2 symbols on AAC; emerging speech with PROMPT cueing

expected.note: Validates max-2 secondaries rule AND clinical content sanity. Should NOT return 3+ secondaries, and any returned secondary must be among the plausibly-present domains in the input.
